textPlain:
I went ahead and downloaded it, it looks to be a VSCode fork very similar to Cursor, with support for the following models:  - Gemini 3 Pro (High)
  - Gemini 3 Pro (Low)
  - Claude Sonnet 4.5
  - Claude Sonnet 4.5 (Thinking)
  - GPT-OSS 120B (Medium)
Haven't we got enough of new eras yet?
Nice to see that it's not locked to just Gemini models
